name: imessage-bluebubbles
description: iMessage connector via BlueBubbles server — bridges iMessage to Arqitect brain via Redis

config_fields.name: bot_aliases
config_fields.description: Alternative names the bot responds to

config_fields.name: whitelisted_users
config_fields.description: Phone numbers or iMessage addresses allowed to interact

config_fields.name: whitelisted_groups
config_fields.description: Group chat GUIDs to process messages from

config_fields.name: monitor_groups
config_fields.description: Group chat GUIDs to observe read-only
